armor-soak-pool.panel.title: Armor Soak
armor-soak-pool.dialogs.damage.title: Apply Damage — {name}
armor-soak-pool.dialogs.damage.instructi: Choose whether this damage is applied to Soak or handled normally by PF1e / Wounds and Vigor.
armor-soak-pool.dialogs.damage.splitHint: For split damage, enter the portion absorbed by Soak. The remaining amount is reported for manual Wounds/Vigor handling.
armor-soak-pool.dialogs.adjust.title: Adjust Soak — {name}
armor-soak-pool.warnings.noPermission: You do not have permission to modify this actor's Soak.
armor-soak-pool.warnings.noDamageHook: No safe Actor.applyDamage method was found. Use the public API macro fallback for manual damage dialogs.
armor-soak-pool.warnings.gmOnly: This tool is only available to Gamemasters.
armor-soak-pool.errors.wrongSystem: PF1e Armor Soak Pool requires the Pathfinder 1st Edition system.
armor-soak-pool.settings.gmTools.name: Armor Soak GM Tools
armor-soak-pool.settings.gmTools.label: Open GM Tools
armor-soak-pool.settings.gmTools.hint: Recalculate, refill, clear, export, and import Armor Soak data.
armor-soak-pool.settings.enabled.name: Enable Armor Soak Pool
armor-soak-pool.settings.enabled.hint: Enable the Armor Soak Pool module features.
armor-soak-pool.settings.autoRefill.name: Enable Automatic Refill
armor-soak-pool.settings.autoRefill.hint: Automatically refill Soak in combat according to the refill timing setting.
armor-soak-pool.settings.refillTiming.hi: Choose when Soak refills during combat.
armor-soak-pool.settings.damageDialog.hi: Enable the Armor Soak damage dialog for manual workflows.
armor-soak-pool.settings.patchDamage.hin: Optionally patch Actor.applyDamage to show the dialog. Leave disabled if it conflicts with Wounds/Vigor or other automation modules.
armor-soak-pool.settings.armorFocus.name: Enable Armor Focus Feat Detection
armor-soak-pool.settings.armorFocus.hint: Detect Armor Focus, Improved Armor Focus, and Advanced Armor Focus by exact feat name.
armor-soak-pool.settings.armorFocusNatur: Optional house rule: let Armor Focus add to natural armor soak as well as worn armor soak.
armor-soak-pool.settings.chatDamage.name: Chat Cards for Damage
armor-soak-pool.settings.chatDamage.hint: Post a chat card when Soak absorbs damage.
armor-soak-pool.settings.chatRefill.name: Chat Cards for Refill
armor-soak-pool.settings.chatRefill.hint: Post a chat card when Soak refills.
armor-soak-pool.settings.chatAdjust.name: Chat Cards for Manual Adjustments
armor-soak-pool.settings.chatAdjust.hint: Post a chat card when Soak is manually adjusted.
armor-soak-pool.settings.showSheet.name: Show on Actor Sheets
armor-soak-pool.settings.showSheet.hint: Show the Armor Soak panel on PF1e actor sheets.
armor-soak-pool.settings.tokenResource.h: Reserved option for token bar workflows. Foundry token bars may need a real system resource path; flags are documented as the safe fallback.
armor-soak-pool.settings.playerAdjust.hi: Allow owners to manually adjust Soak on their own actors.
armor-soak-pool.settings.playerRefill.hi: Allow owners to manually refill Soak on their own actors.
armor-soak-pool.settings.allowOverflow.h: Permit current Soak to exceed maximum Soak.
armor-soak-pool.settings.debug.name: Debug Logging
armor-soak-pool.settings.debug.hint: Log additional diagnostic information to the browser console.
armor-soak-pool.gmTools.title: Armor Soak GM Tools
armor-soak-pool.gmTools.recalculated: Armor Soak recalculated for all actors.
armor-soak-pool.gmTools.refilled: Armor Soak refilled for all combatants.
armor-soak-pool.gmTools.cleared: Armor Soak cleared for all actors.
armor-soak-pool.gmTools.resetConfirm: This removes Armor Soak flags from all world actors. Continue?
armor-soak-pool.gmTools.noSelected: No selected token actor was found.
armor-soak-pool.gmTools.auditComplete: Armor Soak audit complete. Invalid actors: {count}
